creator: owen@easytarget.org
text:
I 'only' have 16Gb of memory on my system, even with the build restricted to one core it OOM's after four hours, should I consider 16Gb insufficient for building Rust?

This is looking crazy; hardly a great advert for Rust that it's build system is so bloated.
Could you at least please remove the 'use system llvm' option if you do not intend to support it.
